code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Logistics_TrackingNumber] --> Initialized: Customer starts process
    
    Initialized --> ProductSelected: Select products/services
    ProductSelected --> SelfDeclared: Complete regulatory forms
    
    SelfDeclared --> BasicDataCollected: Provide contact information
    BasicDataCollected --> ExtendedDataCollected: Risk assessment data
    
    ExtendedDataCollected --> PendingIdentification: Start identity verification
    
    state PendingIdentification {Logistics_TrackingNumber] --> VideoIdent
        [Logistics_Warehouse] --> EID_Integration  
        [Logistics_StockLevel] --> BiometricVerification
        VideoIdent --> IdentityVerified
        EID_Integration --> IdentityVerified
        BiometricVerification --> IdentityVerified
    }
    
    IdentityVerified --> KYC_Processing: Background checks
    
    state KYC_Processing {Logistics_DeliveryRoute] --> PEP_Check
        [Logistics_TrackingNumber] --> Sanctions_Check
        [Logistics_DeliveryRoute] --> AML_Assessment
        PEP_Check --> KYC_Complete
        Sanctions_Check --> KYC_Complete
        AML_Assessment --> KYC_Complete
    }
    
    KYC_Complete --> ContractAccepted: Customer accepts terms
    ContractAccepted --> PendingSignature: Prepare signature
    
    state PendingSignature {Logistics_StockLevel] --> QES_Signature
        [Logistics_DeliveryRoute] --> TwoFA_Signature
        [Logistics_Warehouse] --> Biometric_Signature
        QES_Signature --> DocumentSigned
        TwoFA_Signature --> DocumentSigned
        Biometric_Signature --> DocumentSigned
    }
    
    DocumentSigned --> AccountActivated: Process metadata & distribution
    AccountActivated --> [Logistics_FleetManagement]: Customer onboarded
    
    %% Error states
    ProductSelected --> Failed: Eligibility check failed
    BasicDataCollected --> Failed: Data validation error
    ExtendedDataCollected --> Failed: Risk assessment failed
    PendingIdentification --> Failed: Identity verification failed
    KYC_Processing --> Failed: KYC checks failed
    PendingSignature --> Failed: Signature process failed
    
    Failed --> [Logistics_StockLevel]: Process terminated
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为客户开户流程设计一个完整的状态图，从客户发起申请开始，一直到最终激活账户。整个流程要覆盖KYC合规、身份验证和电子签名三个核心环节。
明白了。我注意到您提到了物流相关的系统，比如TrackingNumber、Warehouse这些，是要把它们作为外部系统的标识符嵌入到流程里吗？
对，我们的开户系统需要对接物流平台的多个模块。TrackingNumber作为流程入口标识，Warehouse和StockLevel会在特定环节被调用。先画主流程：客户启动后进入Initialized状态，然后选择产品到ProductSelected。
好的，主流程前段我画好了：从TrackingNumber触发Initialized，再到ProductSelected。接下来是监管表单环节对吗？
没错，SelfDeclared之后分两层数据采集：先BasicDataCollected收集基础联系信息，再ExtendedDataCollected做风险数据评估。这两层失败都要能走到Failed终止态。
两层数据采集画好了，包括到Failed的分支。现在到身份验证环节PendingIdentification，这里需要支持三种验证方式对吧？
是的，但有个细节：VideoIdent走TrackingNumber入口，EID_Integration对接Warehouse，BiometricVerification对接StockLevel。三种方式都汇聚到IdentityVerified。
PendingIdentification子状态画好了，三个入口分别对应三个物流模块。IdentityVerified之后进入KYC_Processing背景审查，这里也需要子状态吗？
需要。KYC_Processing里做三项并行检查：PEP_Check、Sanctions_Check、AML_Assessment。PEP和AML走DeliveryRoute入口，Sanctions走TrackingNumber。三项都通过才到KYC_Complete。
确认一下：PEP_Check和AML_Assessment共享DeliveryRoute，Sanctions_Check用TrackingNumber。然后KYC_Complete之后是客户接受条款？
对，ContractAccepted之后进入PendingSignature准备签名。签名环节也要子状态，支持三种签名方式。
PendingSignature子状态我画了三种签名：QES_Signature走StockLevel，TwoFA_Signature走DeliveryRoute，Biometric_Signature走Warehouse。都汇聚到DocumentSigned。
最后两步：DocumentSigned之后AccountActivated处理元数据和分发，最终指向FleetManagement表示客户正式入驻。另外所有关键节点都要有Failed分支，最终汇聚到StockLevel终止。
主流程和终止态都画好了。我检查一下Failed分支：ProductSelected、BasicDataCollected、ExtendedDataCollected、PendingIdentification、KYC_Processing、PendingSignature都有失败路径指向Failed，再走到StockLevel。
等等，PendingIdentification到Failed的触发条件应该是"Identity verification failed"，不是"Identification failed"。还有KYC_Processing的失败条件要强调是KYC checks failed。
已修正，PendingIdentification的失败标注改为"Identity verification failed"，KYC_Processing改为"KYC checks failed"。还有其他需要调整的吗？
确认一下各失败条件的具体表述：ProductSelected是"Eligibility check failed"，BasicDataCollected是"Data validation error"，ExtendedDataCollected是"Risk assessment failed"，PendingSignature是"Signature process failed"。
确认，五个失败分支的标注都按您说的：资格检查、数据验证、风险评估、身份验证、KYC检查、签名流程。整个图结构完整了，从TrackingNumber入口到FleetManagement出口。
再补充一个细节：SelfDeclared到BasicDataCollected的触发条件是"Provide contact information"，ExtendedDataCollected到PendingIdentification是"Start identity verification"。这些业务描述要准确。
所有状态转移的标注都已补全。最终确认：三个嵌套子状态分别是身份验证、KYC处理、签名环节，六个物流系统触点分布在关键节点，完整覆盖了客户开户的全生命周期。
